steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that Spanish mission style "has been reproduced throughout the state," and uses Santa Clara University as an example of this pattern.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
Substitute each choice: Santa Clara University's design is considered to ______ the style of the Spanish missions.

A) renovate — "renovate" means to restore or update an existing structure. Santa Clara University didn't rebuild the actual missions; it copied their style in a new building. Eliminate.

B) imitate — "imitate" means to copy or mimic. The passage says elements of the style have been "reproduced" — imitating is reproducing. Keep.

C) neglect — "neglect" means to ignore or fail to care for. A design that echoes mission style is doing the opposite of ignoring it. Eliminate.

D) reject — "reject" means to refuse or dismiss. The university's design draws from the mission style, not away from it. Eliminate.

B is correct.
